data.label: 腾讯优图 SDK
data.description: 腾讯优图 AI 开放平台提供 AI + 互联网、金融、教育等多元化的人工智能服务和行业解决方案，包括人脸核身、人脸防伪、内容安全等领域的产品和案例。

data.label: Tencent Youtu SDK
data.description: Tencent Youtu AI Open Platform provides diversified artificial intelligence services and industry solutions, including products and cases in fields like face authentication, face anti-spoofing, content security, etc.
